title: Register a new account successfully
description: A new user can create an account with a unique email and see account creation confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique email address using a random timestamp
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the sign-up form
Verify an account creation confirmation is visible

title: Log in and reach the home feed
description: An existing user can sign in with valid credentials and land on the authenticated home feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid registered email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated home feed is displayed

title: Lands on the home feed after signing up and logging in
description: A new user can register with a unique email, log in with the required password, and reach the authenticated home feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique timestamped email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with the same unique timestamped email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the home feed
Verify the authenticated entry point is displayed

title: Complete MFA verification after login
description: A user with MFA enabled can enter a valid 6-digit verification code and reach the authenticated home feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid MFA-enrolled registered email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Enter a valid 6-digit verification code
Verify the authenticated home feed is displayed

title: Requires login before accessing protected areas
description: An unauthenticated visitor is redirected away from protected routes and must log in before using the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify access to the authenticated home feed is restricted
Navigate to /profile
Verify protected access requires authentication

title: Create a fresh account and continue into onboarding
description: A new registrant can sign up, log in, and reach the onboarding flow ready to complete profile setup.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique email address using a random timestamp
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the sign-up form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the same email address
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated home feed is displayed

title: Open the admin dashboard with AAL2 MFA verification
description: An admin user can log in, complete AAL2 MFA verification, and reach the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid admin email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Enter a valid 6-digit verification code for MFA
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Complete multi-step onboarding
description: A fresh authenticated member can complete the onboarding steps and see onboarding completion confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid fresh authenticated member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Select identity and preference options for the first onboarding step
Continue to the next onboarding step
Complete the remaining onboarding steps and submit the profile data
Verify onboarding completion confirmation is visible

title: Completes onboarding from a fresh account
description: A freshly registered member can finish the multi-step onboarding flow and continue into discovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique timestamped email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the registration form
Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with the same unique timestamped email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Complete the identity and lifestyle onboarding steps
Continue to discovery
Verify the onboarding flow is completed
Verify the discover experience is displayed

title: Open protected areas after signing in
description: A signed-in member can access protected areas such as matches and chats from the authenticated experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid authenticated member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Click the link to open matches
Click the link to open chats
Verify the chats inbox is displayed

title: Reads chat history and sends a message
description: A member can open a chat thread, review prior messages, and send a new message that appears in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chats
Review the message inbox
Open a chat thread
Read the conversation history
Send a new message
Verify the sent message is added to the thread
Verify the conversation history remains visible

title: Browse roommate cards and see the next candidate after liking
description: A member can open discovery, like a candidate, and see the next roommate card appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid fresh authenticated member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /discover
View the current roommate card
Swipe right to show interest
Verify the next candidate card is displayed

title: Enrolls in MFA from profile security settings
description: An authenticated member can start MFA enrollment, complete the setup steps, and see MFA enabled confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Review security preferences
Start MFA enrollment
Complete the setup steps
Verify MFA enabled confirmation is visible
Verify the security preference reflects MFA being enabled

title: Updates profile details and saves changes
description: An authenticated member can edit profile information and see the updated profile data after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Update the profile information with new details
Save the profile changes

Verify the profile changes are persisted in the interface

Submit the login form
Navigate to /discover
View the current roommate card

Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /profile
Upload a profile photo
Save the profile photo

title: Start password recovery request
description: A user can request password recovery from the recovery page and see confirmation that the request was submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with an account email
Submit the recovery request form
Verify a password recovery confirmation is visible

description: A user can open the reset password page, set a new password, and see confirmation that the password was updated.

steps.description: Navigate to /reset-password
Fill in the new password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Fill in the password confirmation field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the reset password form
Verify a password reset confirmation is visible

title: Rejects incomplete onboarding submission
description: A member cannot finish onboarding when required setup steps are left incomplete and the form shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Leave a required onboarding field empty
Attempt to continue the onboarding flow
Verify an onboarding validation error is visible
Verify the onboarding flow does not advance

title: Block onboarding submission when required steps are incomplete
description: The onboarding flow prevents submission until required selections are made and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid fresh authenticated member email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Attempt to submit the onboarding form without completing required selections
Verify an onboarding validation error is visible

title: Moderate a sensitive profile review
description: An admin can review a pending sensitive profile item and approve or reject it from the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid admin email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Enter a valid 6-digit verification code for MFA
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Open a pending sensitive profile review
Approve or reject the review
Verify the moderation result is displayed

title: Reject a weak password at sign up
description: The sign-up form blocks a weak password and shows a validation error instead of creating an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique email address using a random timestamp
Fill in the password field with a weak password
Submit the sign-up form
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Rejects a weak password during registration
description: A user cannot complete registration with an invalid password and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with a unique timestamped email
Fill in the password field with a weak password
Submit the registration form
Verify a password validation error is visible
Verify the account is not created

title: Handle an invalid MFA code during login
description: The login flow rejects an incorrect 6-digit verification code and keeps the user off the home feed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with a valid MFA-enrolled registered email
Fill in the password field with StrongPassw0rd!123
Submit the login form
Enter an invalid 6-digit verification code
Submit the verification code
Verify a verification code validation error is visible
